name: HSBC Visa Platinum Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under HSBC Visa Platinum Credit Card terms
additionalBenefits: No joining fee and no annual fee
2,000 reward points after logging into HSBC India app and spending Rs 5,000 in first 30 days
3-month Swiggy One membership after card activation
Voucher worth up to Rs 500 for Amazon Pay, Zomato and Swiggy on activation with a single transaction of Rs 300 or more
Up to 6X reward points on hotels, flights and car rentals through Travel with Points
Instantly convert reward points to air miles and hotel loyalty points in HSBC India app
12-month Times Prime subscription, subject to Visa Signature terms
Fuel surcharge waiver up to Rs 250 on fuel payments between Rs 400 and Rs 4,000 a month
Rs 250 cashback on contactless fuel spends up to Rs 10,000 per quarter

salaried: Eligibility is subject to HSBC approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to HSBC approval criteria
